query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drill_customizations` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `drillId` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `thumbnailUrl` text,
  `imageBase64` longtext,
  `imageMimeType` varchar(100),
  `briefDescription` text,
  `difficulty` varchar(50),
  `category` varchar(100),
  `updatedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `drill_customizations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `drill_customizations_drillId_unique` UNIQUE(`drillId`)
);
command:
